regeneration.notes: Live rational, LA, CEX, and calculus (derivative/antiderivative) generation requires MATHEVIDENCE_WOLFRAMSCRIPT (wolframscript). Public CI without Wolfram stays fixture/offline_replay; differential harness labels Mathematica skip/fixture. Committed evidence must always replay offline. Calculus candidates never imply completeness. CEX uses bounded enumeration gated by the same live mode.

knownDefects: LeanLink is scaffold-only (adapters/mathematica/leanlink.py); theorem path uses wolframscript or committed fixtures — see docs/architecture/leanlink-adapter-review.md.
Public CI without MATHEVIDENCE_WOLFRAMSCRIPT cannot exercise the live generator; offline fixtures + differential skip/fixture remain the CI path.
Live calculus ODE/recurrence does not invoke Wolfram solvers; request fields are echoed for Lean-owned identity checks only (no uniqueness/completeness).
Finite CEX live path is bounded enumeration (CAS-independent) gated by wolframscript live mode for honesty with other Mathematica ops.
